title: Hook Feature Toggles
description: Enable/disable switches for the stamped hook features (ADR-0006). One boolean per feature; the per-feature scripts in .claude/hooks/ read this at every firing and no-op when their toggle is off, missing, or malformed (fail safe). Defaults at stamp: gate_reminders on; message_nudge and load_reporting off.

gate_reminders.description: PostToolUse reminder + Stop block when gate-relevant paths are edited without a recorded gate verdict.

message_nudge.description: Follow-through nudge in the sender's session after a teammate message (EXEC-044).
